violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer must be washed, rinsed, and sanitized prior to use. Inspector printed out deli slicing cleaning guide. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The door to the outside, located in the next to the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2024

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The non food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine was turned off. PIC stated ice machine will be sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
